parameters.content:
## Day-of Hype Post Generator
Every morning at 9 AM (MST), this checks if there's an event TODAY.
If yes:
1. Asks OpenClaw for a high-energy 'TONIGHT!' or 'TODAY!' caption
2. Renders a story-event graphic (1080x1920)
3. Uploads to Drive and adds to calendar as 'approved' for 10 AM
4. Notifies Discord

The hype post goes out automatically — no sister input needed!

parameters.text:
=🔥 **Day-of hype post queued for 10 AM!**

**{{ $('Check for Today\'s Events').first().json.venue }}** — {{ $('Check for Today\'s Events').first().json.time }}

{{ $('Build Hype Data').first().json.caption.substring(0, 200) }}...

🖼️ Story graphic generated!
📱 Will auto-post at 10 AM (or check Discord for manual posting).
